items.title: Could Infantino really push through a 64-team World Cup?
items.summary: If we have learned one thing from Gianni Infantino's Fifa tenure, it is that more is better. That could mean 64 teams at the World Cup.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Real Madrid's World Cup numbers embarrassed Europe's giants as Manchester City's huge contingent failed to match them
items.summary: Real Madrid topped World Cup 2026 for attacking output and Europe's biggest clubs dominated, while Manchester City supplied the tournament's largest contingent.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: New owners, team names and much bigger budgets: the 2026 Hundred explained
